message:
🐛 Remove suppressScroll from scaleTiles — fixes tile scroll regression (#192)

The suppressScroll flag was added to scaleTiles in PR #190 to prevent
rocket scroll during fit(), but scaleTiles re-runs on every activeTabId
change (tile click). This blocked wheel events for 300ms on every tile
focus, making scrolling inside tiles unreliable.

The wheel blocker is only needed during font-size changes (already
handled in the globalFontSize effect). Remove it from scaleTiles.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
